system_architecture.description: High-level architecture design for an Agentic Nexus system.

components.name: Frontend Service
components.description: Handles user interaction and presentation layer.
components.scalability_plan: Deploy on CDN; use React Server Components for SSR where applicable.

components.name: Backend Service
components.description: Serves as the middle layer between the frontend and data layer.
responsibilities: Integration with database and external services
components.scalability_plan: Scale horizontally using load balancers; use caching for frequent queries.

components.name: Database Layer
components.scalability_plan: Implement partitioning and sharding for PostgreSQL; cluster Redis for high availability.

components.name: Authentication Service
components.scalability_plan: Deploy Keycloak in HA mode; use tokens for stateless authentication.

components.name: Message Queue
components.scalability_plan: Configure clustered setup with failover; partition topics for Kafka.

components.name: Monitoring and Observability
components.description: Ensures system health and performance visibility.
components.scalability_plan: Scale Prometheus with remote write storage; distribute Elasticsearch nodes.

integration_plan.Monitoring: Expose Prometheus metrics endpoint in all services

scalability_and_resiliency.Load Balancers: Use AWS ALB or Nginx for frontend and backend
scalability_and_resiliency.Autoscaling: Use Kubernetes HPA for containerized services
scalability_and_resiliency.Fault Tolerance: Deploy all critical services with multi-AZ redundancy
